infos.name: bedroom
infos.desc:
You are in a bedroom. A normal kind of place.



There is an exit to the north. Don't worry, it is unguarded. There is an unblocked exit to the west.

infos.name: laundromat
infos.desc:
Here we are in the laundromat.



There is an exit to the east. Don't worry, it is unguarded.

infos.name: workshop
infos.desc:
You find yourself in a workshop.



There is an exit to the south. Don't worry, it is unguarded. There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unblocked.

infos.name: scullery
infos.desc:
You've entered a scullery. You can barely contain your excitement.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going east. You need an unguarded exit? You should try going south.

infos.name: laundry place
infos.desc:
You arrive in a laundry place. A normal one.



There is an unblocked exit to the north.

objective: It's time to explore the amazing world of TextWorld! Your first objective is to travel east. With that over with, head north. Then, make an effort to travel west. Then, venture south. And then, lift the coin from the floor of the laundry place. Once that's all handled, you can stop!
